theorem:  mergesort_permut
sample:   2
attempt:  fix_6

[proof]
simpa [Permut] using (fun t => lemma_hint_24 (l := l) (t := t))

[lean error]
location:
    theorem eval_mergesort_permut [LT T] [DecidableEq T] [DecidableRel (LT.lt (α := T))] (l : List T) : Permut (mergesort l) l := by
      simpa [Permut] using (fun t => lemma_hint_24 (l := l) (t := t))

error: Type mismatch: After simplification, term
  fun t => lemma_hint_24 l t
 has type
  True
but is expected to have type
